about.title: About D-Day Counter
about.desc: DopaBrain D-Day Counter tracks countdowns to birthdays, anniversaries, exams, travel, and more. Features unlimited event registration, yearly repeat reminders, category management, and mini calendar. Completely free.
about.howDesc: Click 'Add New Event', enter the event name, date, and category, then save. Enable the repeat option for annual events. Sort your events by closest, farthest, or most recently added.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How many events can I register?
faq.a1: Unlimited. You can register as many events as you want without any restrictions.
faq.a2: All data is stored in your browser's LocalStorage. Nothing is sent to a server. Your data persists when you revisit using the same browser.
faq.q3: How do I set up recurring events?
faq.a3: When adding an event, enable the 'Repeat yearly' checkbox. This is perfect for birthdays and anniversaries that recur annually.
faq.q4: Can I organize events by category?
faq.a4: Yes, you can categorize events into 6 types: birthday, anniversary, exam, travel, work, and other.
faq.a5: Yes, it is completely free. All features including unlimited events, category management, and mini calendar are available at no cost.
